title: Taj Alibaug Resort & Spa
description: A five-star resort right on Versoli beach offering luxurious rooms, a full-service spa, infinity pool, and fine dining with panoramic sea views. Perfect for a premium weekend escape from Mumbai.

title: Paradise Villas & Resort
description: Beachside resort near Mandwa Jetty featuring private pool villas, lush tropical gardens, kids' play area, and multi-cuisine restaurant. Ideal for families arriving via the Mumbai-Mandwa ferry.
address: Near Coastal Heritage, Mandwa Beach, Alibaug, Maharashtra 402201

title: Zostel Alibaug
description: Alibaug's most popular backpacker hostel with private rooms and dorms, a social rooftop, bike rentals, and community events. Centrally located near Alibaug beach for easy exploration.

title: Veranda Resort Alibaug
description: A boutique eco-resort surrounded by verdant paddy fields and coconut groves. Offers treehouse cottages, organic meals, bird watching trails, and cycling routes through the village.

title: Kihim Courtyard by amã
description: A heritage-styled private villa managed by amã Stays & Trails with three bedrooms, a plunge pool, and a manicured courtyard. Minutes from the serene Kihim beach and butterfly sanctuary.

title: Boardwalk by Flamboyante
description: Alibaug's most iconic waterfront restaurant serving Continental, Indian, and seafood dishes with a stunning view of the Arabian Sea. Known for their wood-fired pizzas and fresh catch of the day.

title: Kiki's Bar & Kitchen
description: A lively beach shack-style restaurant famous for its Goan-Konkan fusion menu. Popular for chilled cocktails, prawn koliwada, and live music sessions on weekends.

title: Buono Pizzeria
description: Alibaug's favourite Italian bistro serving authentic wood-fired Neapolitan pizzas, fresh pastas, and homemade gelatos. A cosy indoor space with fairy lights and weekend brunches.

title: The Lighthouse Bistro
description: A charming cliffside cafe near Versoli beach known for all-day English breakfasts, fresh fruit juices, and spectacular sunset views. Excellent coffee and homemade cakes.

title: Sunderban Beach Shack
description: An open-air beach shack right on Nagaon beach serving Konkan-style seafood — fresh bombil, surmai, and prawns prepared in traditional masalas. Perfect sundowner spot.

title: Kolaba Fort Guided Tour
description: Step into the 17th-century Kolaba Fort built by Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj. At low tide you can walk across the shallow sea to reach it; a knowledgeable guide brings the history to life with stories of Maratha sea power.
whatsapp: Walking Tour | Low-tide access from Alibaug Beach

title: Kanakeshwar Forest Trek
description: A guided half-day nature trek through the dense Kanakeshwar forest to the ancient Lord Shiva temple on the hilltop. The trail passes through lush greenery, streams, and rich birdlife.

title: Nagaon Beach Water Sports
description: Alibaug's premier water sports hub offering jet skiing, banana boat rides, parasailing, zorbing, and speed boat rides. Operated by certified instructors on the clean shores of Nagaon beach.

title: Murud-Janjira Fort Day Trip
description: Explore the majestic Murud-Janjira — India's only unconquered sea fort. A scenic 1.5-hour drive from Alibaug followed by a short boat ride takes you to this remarkable island fortress surrounded by the Arabian Sea.

title: Kashid Beach Camping
description: A guided overnight camping experience on Kashid's pristine white-sand beach. Includes bonfire, BBQ dinner, beach games, and a sunrise yoga session. Accessible via a scenic coastal drive from Alibaug.

title: Konkan Food & Culture Walk
description: A curated 2-hour walking and tasting tour through Alibaug town's local markets, fishing docks, and street food stalls. Meet local fishermen, taste fresh kolambi bhaji, solkadhi, and discover the town's Portuguese-Maratha heritage.

title: Nagaon Sunset Beach Party
description: A monthly sunset beach party on Nagaon beach featuring local DJs, food trucks, live art installations, and beach bonfires. The most popular social event of the Alibaug weekend calendar.

title: Alibaug Craft Beer Festival
description: An annual two-day outdoor craft beer and food festival in Alibaug town featuring 15+ Indian craft breweries, live bands, street food, and craft workshops. Draws crowds from Mumbai and Pune every season.

title: Weekend Yoga & Wellness Retreat
description: A weekend mindfulness retreat at a Kihim beachside property offering sunrise yoga, meditation sessions, pranayama workshops, Ayurvedic meals, and herbal oil massages. Limited to 12 participants.

title: Konkan Stargazing Night
description: An intimate guided stargazing experience on the open fields of Kashid with a professional astronomer. Includes telescope viewing, constellation stories, a bonfire, and traditional Konkan dinner.

title: Mandwa Ferry Service
description: Regular ferry service connecting Mandwa Jetty (Alibaug) to Mumbai's Gateway of India. Speed boat and RoRo ferries available. Book in advance on weekends for guaranteed seats.

title: Alibaug Cab & Local Transport
description: Reliable local cab and tempo traveller service covering all of Alibaug and the Konkan coast. Airport transfers, inter-city routes, and custom sightseeing packages. Available 24/7.

title: Sunrise Spa & Wellness Alibaug
description: A boutique wellness centre in Alibaug town offering Ayurvedic massages, body wraps, facial treatments, and relaxation therapies. Walk-in and pre-booked appointments available.

title: Konkan Catering Services
description: Premium Konkan-style catering for private events, villa stays, and house parties in Alibaug. Specialties include sol kadhi, fish curry, kombdi vade, and traditional sweets. Minimum 10 persons.

title: Alibaug Bike & Cycle Rentals
description: Rent bicycles, scooters, and Royal Enfield motorbikes by the hour or day to explore Alibaug's beaches and countryside at your own pace. Helmets and basic insurance included.

title: Beachfront Plot in Mandwa
description: Premium 4200 sq. ft. NA-converted residential plot near Mandwa Jetty with sea-facing potential. Excellent investment opportunity with rapid appreciation due to proximity to Mumbai ferry terminal and MTHL corridor.

title: Farmhouse Plot in Kihim
description: 5000 sq. ft. agricultural plot in serene Kihim village, ideal for a private farmhouse or weekend retreat. Electricity and road connectivity available. Walking distance to Kihim butterfly sanctuary and beach.

title: Kashid Beachside Land
description: 7200 sq. ft. plot in Kashid village, 800 metres from the white-sand Kashid beach. Peaceful surroundings with sea breeze. Suitable for holiday home construction after NA conversion.

title: Ready Villa for Sale in Awas
description: Fully constructed 3-bedroom independent villa in Awas with a private swimming pool, landscaped garden, and Caretaker's quarter. Immediate possession. Suitable for personal use and vacation rental income.

title: Gated Farmhouse Plot in Nagaon
description: 2-Guntha (2178 sq. ft.) plot in a gated farmhouse community near Nagaon beach. Development-ready with internal roads, compound wall, electricity, and water connection. Clear title.
